name: Scout
description: Open-source alternative to Skillsync. Scout analyzes GitHub profiles with AI-powered insights to find developers and understand their expertise.
longDescription: Skillsync charges for analyzing GitHub profiles to find engineers. Scout provides the same functionality through an open-source workflow powered by Google's Gemini API. Analyze developer backgrounds, technical skills, domain expertise, activity patterns, and repository statistics while keeping the stack inspectable and self-hostable. All data stays private, and you bring your own API keys instead of paying for a closed recruiting tool.

name: Shannon
description: Open-source alternative to Hex Security. Shannon is an autonomous AI pentester that runs continuous penetration tests and verifies critical vulnerabilities.
longDescription: Hex Security charges for AI agents that automate penetration testing. Shannon is a fully autonomous, white-box AI pentester that analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production. It performs white-box security testing by combining source code analysis with live exploitation across OWASP categories (Injection, XSS, SSRF, Broken Authentication/Authorization). Shannon operates with a 'no exploit, no report' policy—only proven vulnerabilities with reproducible PoCs are included. This fork includes comprehensive performance and cost optimizations targeting 60-85% reduction in runtime and costs: incremental scanning (only analyzes changed files, 80-90% cost reduction for small changes), caching system (30-50% faster), context prioritization (focuses on high-risk code paths), model tier optimization (uses smaller models when appropriate, 20-40% cost reduction), and parallel execution optimization. Run it continuously, self-hosted, with your own API keys. No monthly subscriptions, no vendor lock-in.

name: FormFlow
description: Open-source alternative to qomplement. FormFlow handles document parsing, OCR, table extraction, and PDF form filling with Gemini-powered analysis.
longDescription: qomplement focuses on AI agents for document filling. FormFlow provides an open-source path to that workflow with document upload, OCR, AI-assisted extraction, table parsing, form field detection, and both native and static PDF form filling. It supports PDFs, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, and images, includes coordinate-based overlay filling for non-interactive PDFs, and can optionally integrate with Google Workspace. You can self-host it, inspect the full codebase, and bring your own Gemini API key instead of depending on a closed document automation product.
